message:
fp-expr: add DataFrame-backed evaluation bridge via EvalContext (bd-3l4a)

Introduce a direct bridge from `fp-frame::DataFrame` into the expression
planner execution path so callers can evaluate expressions against frame
columns without manually constructing an `EvalContext`.

What changed:
- Added `EvalContext::from_dataframe(&DataFrame) -> Result<EvalContext, ExprError>`:
  - Iterates DataFrame columns
  - Materializes each column as a `Series` sharing the DataFrame index
  - Inserts all series bindings into the context by column name
- Added `evaluate_on_dataframe(...)` helper:
  - Builds context from DataFrame with `EvalContext::from_dataframe`
  - Delegates to existing `evaluate(...)`
  - Returns the resulting `Series`

Tests:
- `eval_context_from_dataframe_builds_series_bindings`
  - verifies all DataFrame columns are bound as expected with matching index.
- `evaluate_on_dataframe_matches_manual_context_eval`
  - verifies DataFrame-backed evaluation is equivalent to explicit manual
    context wiring for the same expression.

Docs:
- Updated `FEATURE_PARITY.md` expression planner notes to reflect DataFrame-
  backed bridge coverage (`EvalContext::from_dataframe`,
  `evaluate_on_dataframe`).

Why:
- This closes an integration gap between DataFrame storage and expression
  planning, and is a direct foundational step toward pandas-style
  DataFrame/query/eval workflows.

Validation:
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt --check`
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-expr`
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets`
- `rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --staged --only=rust .` (critical=0)

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 | Feature Family | Status | Notes |
 |---|---|---|
 | DataFrame/Series constructors | in_progress | `Series::from_values` + `DataFrame::from_series` MVP implemented; `FP-P2C-003` extends arithmetic fixture coverage; broader constructor parity pending |
-| Expression planner arithmetic | in_progress | `fp-expr` now supports `Expr::Add`/`Sub`/`Mul`/`Div`, logical mask composition (`Expr::And`/`Or`/`Not`), plus `Expr::Compare` (`eq`/`ne`/`lt`/`le`/`gt`/`ge`) with full-eval and incremental-delta paths (including series-scalar anchoring); broader window/string/date expression surface still pending |
+| Expression planner arithmetic | in_progress | `fp-expr` now supports `Expr::Add`/`Sub`/`Mul`/`Div`, logical mask composition (`Expr::And`/`Or`/`Not`), plus `Expr::Compare` (`eq`/`ne`/`lt`/`le`/`gt`/`ge`) with full-eval and incremental-delta paths (including series-scalar anchoring), and includes a DataFrame-backed eval bridge (`EvalContext::from_dataframe`, `evaluate_on_dataframe`); broader window/string/date expression surface still pending |
 | Index alignment and selection | in_progress | `FP-P2C-001`/`FP-P2C-002` packet suites green with gate validation and RaptorQ sidecars; `FP-P2C-010` adds series/dataframe filter-head-loc-iloc basics; `FP-P2D-025` extends DataFrame loc/iloc row+column selector parity; `FP-P2D-026` adds DataFrame head/tail parity; `FP-P2D-027` adds DataFrame head/tail negative-`n` parity; core DataFrame ordering APIs `sort_index`/`sort_values` now implemented in `fp-frame`; full selector+ordering matrix still pending |
 | GroupBy core aggregates | in_progress | `FP-P2C-005` and `FP-P2C-011` suites green (`sum`/`mean`/`count` core semantics); broader aggregate matrix still pending |
 | Join/merge/concat core | in_progress | `FP-P2C-004` and `FP-P2C-006` suites green for series-level join/concat semantics; `FP-P2D-014` covers DataFrame merge + axis=0 concat matrix; `FP-P2D-028` adds DataFrame concat axis=1 outer alignment parity; `FP-P2D-029` adds axis=1 `join=inner` parity; `FP-P2D-030` adds axis=0 `join=inner` shared-column parity; `FP-P2D-031` adds axis=0 `join=outer` union-column/null-fill parity; `FP-P2D-032` adds axis=0 `join=outer` first-seen column-order (`sort=False`) parity; `FP-P2D-039` adds DataFrame merge `how='cross'` semantics (including suffix/indicator and invalid key/index guard rails); full DataFrame merge/concat contracts still pending |
